title: 7-day sample meal plan for the third trimester
excerpt: Smaller frequent meals with protein, iron, and calcium for the final months — adjust with your clinician for weight or GDM.
content:
## Principles

Smaller meals with adequate **protein, iron, calcium, and fiber**; steady hydration. Adjust for weight trends and medical conditions.

## 7-day outline (abbreviated)

**Mon:** Egg congee morning; steamed fish lunch + greens; lean beef noodle soup evening (low fat).

**Tue:** Yogurt + banana; beef stir-fry with cabbage + rice; oatmeal evening.

**Wed:** Egg toast; pasta with tomato and lean mince; tofu soup.

**Thu:** Chicken phở; shrimp rice (shrimp fully cooked); warm milk snack.

**Fri:** Sticky rice with beans; young ribs with cucumber + rice; fruit.

**Sat:** Fish congee; mushroom vegetable hot pot (meats well done); yogurt.

**Sun:** Grilled pork with noodles (well done); vegetable fried rice; moderate walnuts.

## Notes

Sample only; allergies or gestational diabetes need individualized menus.
